---
description: Enforce Creator's License and README notice
applyTo: '*'
---

When starting a new project or making significant project updates in this repository, ensure the license is set to the Creator's License.

- Mention the Creator's License URL: `https://lucasburlingham.me/LICENSE.md` in `README.md`.
- Confirm that license text or reference is present in any relevant distribution documentation.
- If the repository has `LICENSE` file, make it clear it is the Creator's License.
